summary: Priya is a 24-year-old garment worker from Tirupur with 4 years of factory experience. She manages quality control at her station, keeps household accounts in a khatabook, and has basic English for reading garment specifications.

skills.evidence: Works in RMG factory for 4 years
Manages quality control at her station

skills.source_activity: Training new workers at the station
Finding faster ways to complete stitch patterns

intake_transcript.question: What do you spend most of your time doing each day?
intake_transcript.answer: I work in a garment factory in Tirupur. I sew sleeves and check for defects at the quality station.

intake_transcript.question: What skills have you learned on your own?
intake_transcript.answer: I taught myself to read the specification sheets in English. I also keep my household accounts in a khatabook.

intake_transcript.question: What languages do you speak?
intake_transcript.answer: Tamil is my mother tongue. I can read basic English from the spec sheets at work.

intake_transcript.question: Have you ever taught someone or organized people?
intake_transcript.answer: Yes, when new workers join, the supervisor asks me to show them how to set up the machine correctly.

intake_transcript.question: What tools or technology do you use?
intake_transcript.answer: Industrial sewing machine, measuring tape, defect inspection light. I use a basic Android phone for WhatsApp.
